name: Kali (kali-mcp)
onCreateCommand: bash -c 'set -e; export DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive; apt-get update; apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends ca-certificates curl iproute2 python3-pip python3-venv nmap nmap-common network-manager dnsutils; apt-get install -y exploitdb || true'
postCreateCommand: python3 -m venv .venv && . .venv/bin/activate && pip install -U pip setuptools wheel && pip install -e .
postStartCommand: test -f .venv/bin/kali-mcp && echo 'kali-mcp: run  source .venv/bin/activate && kali-mcp  (or: Tasks → Run kali-mcp). Port 8765 is forwarded; use the Codespaces public URL in Anubis Settings if the device can reach the internet, or use host USB/adb for local dev.'
